overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a cowboy character exploring a geothermal hot spring area with vibrant blue pools, steam vents, and distant snow-capped mountains. The character walks along the mineral crust edge, pauses to observe the steaming landscape, then continues through barren geothermal terrain and grassy meadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal hot spring edge with mineral crust deposits

events.description: character stops walking and stands still to observe the hot spring
god rays become more prominent through the steam and trees

agents.ego_description: walking along the hot spring edge then stopping to stand and survey the steaming geothermal landscape

entered.detail: vibrant blue thermal pool with clear water showing mineral formations beneath
orange and white mineral crust forming the edge of the hot spring
dense evergreen trees surrounding the geothermal area
multiple geothermal steam columns rising from the ground in the distance
distant mountain peak with snow visible on the summit

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the edge of a stunning blue hot spring surrounded by colorful mineral deposits. Steam rises from vents in the distance while morning light filters through the pine forest. The character stops to observe the serene geothermal landscape with snow-capped mountains visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: barren geothermal basin with steam vents and mineral crust

events.description: character resumes walking away from the hot spring pool
moving from the hot spring edge into the open geothermal field with scattered steam vents

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the steaming geothermal terrain, navigating around mineral formations

entered.detail: narrow channel of water flowing through the mineral crust
sparse dead pine trees scattered across the geothermal landscape

segments.scene_description: Leaving the hot spring behind, the character traverses a barren geothermal basin with steam vents dotting the landscape. A small geothermal creek winds through the mineral-crusted ground, and dead standing trees punctuate the stark terrain. The snow-capped mountain remains visible to the right as the character walks deeper into the steaming wilderness.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow transitioning from geothermal terrain

events.description: ground surface transitions from mineral crust to tall grassy meadow

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass toward distant geothermal features and possible wildlife

notable_agents.action: distant white animals grazing or moving in the meadow ahead

entered.detail: tall green and brown grasses covering the geothermal terrain

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts to a grassy meadow with tall vegetation swaying in the breeze. The character walks toward distant geothermal features still visible on the horizon, with steam continuing to rise from vents in the background. The snow-capped mountain looms closer on the right, and distant wildlife may be visible ahead in the open field.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a vibrant geothermal spring into a stark volcanic basin and finally into a lush open meadow. It begins with the character walking along the edge of a brilliant blue hot spring surrounded by colorful mineral deposits, pausing as morning light filters through a pine forest toward distant snow-capped mountains. As the character leaves the water behind, the scene shifts into a barren geothermal basin where steam vents dot the mineral-crusted ground and a small creek winds past dead standing trees. The terrain then opens up into a grassy meadow with tall vegetation swaying in the breeze, while the steaming wilderness and the looming mountain remain visible in the background. The camera finally follows the character deeper into the open field toward distant wildlife and the fading geothermal horizon.
